name: Valor Futuro de Anuidade
description: Calcule o valor futuro de uma série de pagamentos iguais.
seo_title: Valor Futuro de Anuidade – Fácil e Grátis
seo_description: Calcule o valor futuro de uma série de pagamentos iguais. Calculadora gratuita, precisa e instantânea. Com explicacao de estatisticas.
example_label: Calculating future value of $500 annual payments at 6% interest over 20 years.
result_context: The fv of {fv} is the accumulated value of all payments plus compound interest.
mistakes: Using ordinary annuity formula when payments are at beginning (annuity due)
Not matching payment frequency with interest rate period
Forgetting that inflation reduces real future value
